name: Witches Brew
directions: Mix

name: Hot Spiced Sugar Free Witches Brew
directions: In a large pot, slowly bring all ingredients except cinnamon sticks to a boil.
Stir and reduce heat to a low simmer.
Serve hot in cups with cinnamon stick swizzles.

name: Dracula's Blood
directions: Shake ingredients together with ice.
Pour into a tall glass.

name: Ecto Lime Cooler (Halloween Cocktail)
directions: Mix together everything in a large pitcher and serve.

name: Smashing Pumpkin Shot
directions: Add Bailey's, Goldschlager and Kahlua to an ice filled shaker and shake.
Pour into shot glasses.
You can ignite the shot by adding 151 to the top and sprinkle cinnamon on the flame to "cook" and for dramatic effect.
Blow out and serve.

similar.name: Pumpkin Butterbeer With Cinnamon Whipped Cream

name: Witchypoo
directions: Dust martini glass with cocoa power.
Combine ingredients in shaker. Shake and strain.

name: The Green Lantern
directions: Pour Gosling's Black Seal Rum on top of the limeade over ice in a highball glass.
Insert a green glow stick as the stirrer or glowing ice cubes.

name: Halloween Black Brew
directions: Use a hurricane glass.
Fill with ice, Malibu Rum, Blue Curacao, Chambord, Grenadine.
Fill the rest with Cranberry.
Top and Shake.

name: Hot Witch's Brew
directions: Combine cocoa, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt in pan.
Add the 1/2 cup hot water slowly.
Heat to boiling, stirring, and cook 2 minutes
Add milk; but do not boil.
Remove from heat, add vanilla and cloves.
Beat with mixer until frothy and serve in mugs with cinnamon stick.

similar.name: Hot Spiced Sugar Free Witches Brew
Pumpkin Butterbeer With Cinnamon Whipped Cream

name: Black Bat Punch
directions: Scoop out the ice cream with a small spoon and place the small scoops onto a baking sheet.
Freeze for at least an hour to firm.
Right before serving mix together the sodas, orange juice concentrate, and drink mix until smooth in a large punch bowl.
Add the vanilla ice cream and black sprinkles and serve immediately.

name: Witches' Brew (Hot Chocolate)
directions: Bring water and cinnamon candies to boil over medium high heat in medium saucepan, stirring until candies melt.
Add milk; whisk in drink mix and return to a simmer.
Pour into mugs.  Top with canned chocolate whipped topping.

name: Bewitched
directions: Combine ingredients in a mixing glass with ice.
Stir gently and strain into a large shot glass or cordial glass.

name: Black Magic
directions: Combine ingredients in a mixing glass with ice and stir gently.
Strain into a highball glass over ice. Garnish with a lemon twist.

name: Corpse Reviver
directions: In a mixing glass filled with ice, combine the brandy, apply brandy and sweet vermouth and stir well.
Strain into a martini glass.

name: Moontini
directions: Mix well in a shaker with ice.
Strain and serve straight up in chilled martini glass.

name: Tequila Ghost
directions: Combine Tequila, Anise and Lemon juice in a shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a highball glass over ice.
Top with a splash of club soda.

name: Fallen Angel
directions: In a shaker filled with a cup of ice, pour the gin, Creme de Menthe, Juice and bitters. Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Black Cat
directions: Pour the vodka and brandy into a highball glass and  filled with ice.
Top with equal amounts of cranberry juice and cola.

name: Black Martini
directions: Pour the ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass or serve on the rocks in an old-fashioned glass.
Garnish with a lemon twist or black olive.

name: Jack O'tini
directions: Place a large soup pot filled with water on the stove to boil.
Carve the tops from the pumpkin and set aside.
Scope out the interior and seeds, leaving a think shell.
Place the pumpkin in the boiling water and boil for about a minute.
Remove and drain.
Combine remaining ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Strain into the pumpkin.
Serve with a black straw.

name: Ghost Cocktail
directions: Mix all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glass rimmed with white chocolate shavings.

name: Masquerade
directions: Place the cardamom seed with the bitters in an empty martini shaker and muddle.
Fill the martini shaker with ice, add the egg white and shake well.
Add the remaining ingredients and shake well.
Strain into a chilled Riesling glass and garnish with orange zest.

name: Fox Poison
directions: Build in highball glass.
Stir and fill up with ice cold milk.

name: Black Shadow
directions: Shake together Blue Curacao and Creme De Cassis in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Pour into flute glass and top up with chilled Champagne.

name: Abracadabra
directions: Shake all the ingredients with ice.
Strain over crushed ice.

name: Orange Spooky Mist
directions: Build overice in a highball glass.
Decorate with a orange wedge cut like a "Jack O'Lantern" and carbonic ice.

name: Blue Lime Ghost
directions: Build in a highball glass packed with ice.

name: Creepy Crawler Punch
directions: Combine ingredients in a large punch bowl with a block of ice in the center.

name: Halloween Cocktail
directions: Mix all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Pour into a tall glass.
Garnish with olives.

name: Night Black
directions: Build in a highball glass packed with ice.
Fill up with cranberry juice.
Top with a squeeze of lime.

name: Galliano Vampire Revenge
directions: Build first 3 ingredients in a highball glass packed with ice.
Cut off the top of lime and remove the lime flesh.
Pour Cointreau into the lime bowl.
Just before serving light Cointreau on fire.
Put the fire out by pouring the burning Cointreau into the drink before drinking.

name: Little Devil
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice and shake well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass over ice.
Drop in the cherry.

name: Dracula's Kiss
directions: Coat the bottom of a highball glass with grenadine.
Add ice and vodka.
Fill with cola.
Garnish with cherries.

name: Sewer Water
directions: Build over lots of ice in a highball glass.

name: Creepy Crawler
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Serve in mason jar and garnish with gummi worms.

name: Taboo
directions: Combine vodka, triple sec, cranberry juice and sour mix in a blender with one cup ice.
Blend until smooth and serve in a highball glass.
Garnish with pineapple wedge and maraschino cherry.

name: Seven Deadly Sins
directions: In a Collins glass, pour alcohol over ice, top with cola, stir.
Add 7 cherries.

name: Mold
directions: Build in a highball glass packed with ice.
Top with Red Bull.

name: Tootsie Roll
directions: Mix all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glass and garnish with tootsie roll.

name: Vampire
directions: Pour the vodka and black raspberry liqueur into a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into an old-fashioned glass filled with ice.

name: Red Death
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker filled with a cup of ice.
Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Swamp Thing
directions: Shake vodka and Irish cream with lots of ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a highball glass with large ice cubes.
Top up with cola.

name: Voodoo Daiquiri
directions: Combine Bourbon, Vodka, grape juice and ice into a blender and blend at a medium speed until smooth.
Pour into a chilled Collins glass.

name: Zombie
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients except the 151 with crushed ice.
Blend at a high speed until smooth and pour into a Collins glass.
Float the 151 rum on top and garnish with the orange slice and maraschino cherry.

name: Corpse Reviver
directions: In a mixing glass filled with ice, combine the brandy, fernet branca and the crÃ¨me de menthe and stir well.
Strain into a martini glass.

name: White Lady
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Decorate with a red cherry.

name: Swamp Water Surprise
directions: Dissolve the Jell-O in boiling water.
Add the vodka and set it in the freezer.
When jello is set, pour the rum, blue Curacao and juices into a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a scoop of the jello.

name: Sewer Pipe
directions: Build in a highball glass packed with ice and lime pieces.
Top with Coke.

name: Vampire's Kiss
directions: Mix in cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into old fashioned glass with ice.

name: Blue Devil
directions: Shake with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Decorate with a slice of orange and a red cherry.

name: Demon Possession
directions: In a shaker, combine alcohol with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into chilled highball glass filled with crushed ice and garnish with a cherry.

name: Zombie Cocktail
directions: Mix light and dark rum and brandy in a cocktail shaker, add lime juice and grenadine.
Shake well and strain into a higball glass filled with cracked ice.
Fill glass with orange juice but leave enough room to float the 151 on top.
Garnish with a cherry and orange slice.

name: Jack-O-Lantern
directions: Shake all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain the mixture into a chilled martini glass and garnish with a ginger bread cookie.

name: Gangrene
directions: Shake with ice.
Strain into a glass, over ice.

name: Devil’s Brew
directions: Combine the Crème De Cassis, Tequila and lime juice in a hurricane glass with ice.
Top with ginger ale.
Garnish with a slice of lime if desired.

name: After Dark Martini
directions: Stir all ingredients with ice.
Strain into glass.

name: Black Witch
directions: Mix all ingredients with cracked ice in a shaker.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Candy Bag
directions: Shake with lots of ice in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a highball glass packed with ice.
Top with sprite.
Decorate with candy!

name: Gangrene Zombie
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a lowball glass.

name: Witches Brew
directions: Combine apple juice, water, vodka, and lime juice in a large bowl.
Cover and chill just before serving, spoon sherbet into a large punch bowl, slowly pour apple juice mixture and club soda over sherbet stirring gently.

name: Devil’s Tail
directions: Mix all with ice in a blender.
Pour into a chilled cocktail glass.
Twist lime peel over drink and drop into glass.

name: Green Goblin Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake well and pour over ice cubes in an old-fashioned glass. Serve with a lime wedge.

name: Black Margarita
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice. Shake well and pour into a salt-rimmed glass. Garnish with lime.

name: Jack O Lantern
directions: Heat water.
Add cider, tea, sugar, lemon juice, cloves, cinnamon and cinnamon stick.
Serve hot.

similar.name: Hot Spiced Sugar Free Witches Brew

name: Witch's Cauldron Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients into a punch bowl or cauldron.
Stir and chill.
Serve with a spoon or ladle.

name: Witch Doctor
directions: In a glass filled with ice, pour light rum and coconut rum.
Add cranberry juice.
Fill with orange juice and float dark rum on top.
Garnish with cherry and orange slice.

name: Rotting Pumpkin Martini
directions: Combine peach schnapps & cranberry juice in a martini shaker with ice.
Shake well and strain into a martini glass.
Using the back of a spoon or a pourer spout, carefully pour the Blavod on the edge of the glass so that it rests on top, causing a layered look.

name: Black Widow Cocktail
directions: Add ice to a highball glass & pour cranberry juice in it.
Carefully pour the Blavod on the edge of the glass so that it rests on top, causing a layered look.
Can either tilt the glass & pour on the edge, use the back of a spoon or a pourer spout.

name: Steaming Green Goblin
directions: Chill a martini glass in the freezer.
Mix together a scoop of crushed ice, midori, vodka, blue curacao, and sweet & sour mix in a cocktail shaker.   Strain into chilled martini glass.
Drop a small piece of dry ice into the mixture and serve.

name: Dark and Spooky Cocktail
directions: Spread out the black sugar on a small plate. Rub the lime wedge around the rim of a rocks glass; dip the glass in the black sugar, then fill with ice.

Combine the rum and lime juice in a cocktail shaker. Fill with ice and shake well. Carefully strain into the glass, minding the sugar on the rim. Top the drink with ginger beer and add the gummy spider.

name: Pumpkin Martini
directions: Dip rim of martini glass in cinnamon-flavored syrup, then into graham cracker crumbs to coat.

Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice. Add pumpkin puree, half-and-half, vanilla vodka, rum, butterscotch schnapps, and pumpkin pie spice. Shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds, Strain into prepared glass and serve immediately.

similar.name: Pumpkin Butterbeer With Cinnamon Whipped Cream

name: Black Cosmopolitan
directions: Fill cocktail shaker halfway with ice. Add cranberry juice, vodka, orange liquer, and lime juice to shaker and shake vigorously for 5-10 seconds. Strain into chilled martini glass.

name: Yummy Pumpkin Pie Martini
directions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice. Shake vigorously and strain into a martini glass. Garnish and serve.

similar.name: Pumpkin Butterbeer With Cinnamon Whipped Cream

name: Peacock Tonic
directions: Vigorously shake Chartreuse, gin, curacao, and ice in a cocktail shaker.
Pour into an ice-filled glass, and top with tonic.
Garnish with a lemon-peel twist.

name: Bloody Carrie
directions: Fill a shaker halfway with ice cubes.
Add bloody mary mix, tomato juice, vodka, olive juice, hot sauce, and pepper.
Shake mixture vigorously for 5-10 seconds.
Pour into chilled glass.
Garnish with mozzarella balls stuffed with sliced green olives, if desired.

name: Pumpkin Spice Russian
directions: Fill short glass with ice. Measure in ingredients. Mix.  Enjoy!

name: Witches' Brew
directions: In a small saucepan, bring sugar and water to a boil. Cook and stir until sugar is dissolved; set aside to cool.
Place the kiwi, mint and sugar syrup in a blender; cover and process until blended. Tint green if desired. Pour into a large pitcher; stir in vodka if desired. Refrigerate until chilled.
Just before serving, stir in ginger ale. Serve over ice. Yield: 6 servings.

name: Pumpkin Butterbeer With Cinnamon Whipped Cream
directions: Add first four ingredients to a blender (you'll likely need to blend in two batches) and blend until smooth and frothy.
Divide among glasses and top off each one with ginger beer.
To make cinnamon whipped cream: Whip heavy cream until soft peaks form. Add cinnamon and nutmeg and whip until combined.
Top each glass with whipped cream and gold sprinkles.

name: Season of the Witch
directions: Egg Shell:
Carefully crack the egg 1/3 from the top to create a hole to release the yolk and whites into a bowl.
Rinse off cracked egg shell and soak in a solution of 2 tablespoons of white wine vinegar and 1 quart of warm water to sanitize.
Rinse and peel out inner membrane of egg shell for garnish use.
Cocktail Directions:
Shake ingredients in shaker with 1 Kold Draft ice cube for 3-5 minutes until ice has fully diluted into liquid (when you no longer hear the ice shaking around).
Pour contents into chilled Collins glass, then top with tonic water and soda.
Garnish carefully with cracked egg shell filled with star anise and dashes of bitters and absinthe, and light with match or lighter so it smokes gently.

name: The Re-Animator
directions: Build all ingredients (except Transfusion liqueurs) in Collins glass with Kold Draft ice, leaving 1/4 of the glass unfilled.
Fill plastic syringe half-way with “Re-Animator Transfusion” and have drinker infuse drink upon serving.

name: Pumpkinhead
directions: Cinnamon Bark Simple Syrup:
Equal parts sugar and hot water by weight, infused with 4 crushed cinnamon sticks or bark for 30 minutes while hot, then strained.
Pepita-Cinnamon Orgeat:
Toast 200 grams of pepitas for 3-4 minutes, then combine with 660 grams of hot water (not boiling) and pulse in high-speed blender until smooth.
Strain and re-blend with 600 grams of white granulated sugar, a pinch of xanthan gum, and a pinch of gum Arabic.
Combine equal parts by weight with Cinnamon Bark Simple Syrup.
Directions:
Dry shake all ingredients (except Palo Cortado Sherry), then pour into tiki glass and top with pebble ice, and float sherry on top.
Garnish with a carved orange wedge with cherry skewer atop a hand-crafted ice bowl dashed with peychaud’s bitters.

name: Santa Sangre
directions: Horseradish Mezcal:
Infuse 1 liter of Vida Mezcal with 50 grams of sliced horseradish for 2 days, then strain.
Directions:
Heat ingredients (except Ginger Beer) with portable water heater or microwave, then pour into hot toddy glass and top with Ginger Beer.
Garnish with baby’s breath dipped in brandied cherry syrup, dehydrated lime wheel, and clove-studded orange peel.

name: POLAR-Geist
directions: Pandan Simple Syrup:
Steep 3 Pandan leaves in 1 liter of hot water for 30 minutes, then strain into equal parts granulated sugar by weight.
Directions:
Blend ingredients with 2 cups of crushed ice.
Serve in a julep-style glass topped with shredded coconut, skull head ornament, and skeleton arm swizzle.

name: Attack of the Killer Tomatoes
directions: Build muddle parsley leaves into all other ingredients in a Collins glass, fill with pebble ice, and swizzle for about 10 seconds.
Top with more pebble ice, then garnish with large sprig of parsley and 3 cherry tomato halves skewered.

name: Children of the Corn
directions: Spiced Corn Yogurt:

Bring 300 grams of raw corn kernels and 300 grams of water to a boil with 2 crushed cinnamon sticks and a teaspoon of cayenne pepper for 15 minutes, then combine with 300 grams of white granulated sugar.
Cool mixture, then blend in high-speed blender and strain contents with a fine mesh strainer.
Cayenne Tincture:
Infuse 1 cup of overproof vodka (150-proof or higher) with 3 tablespoons of ground cayenne pepper for 24 hours then fine strain through a coffee filter.
Directions:
Whip ingredients (except Coffee Liqueurs) with pebble ice and pour into chilled Hurricane glass.
Top with pebble ice and float Coffee Liqueurs on top.
Garnish with dehydrated lime wheel and dried corn husk.
